title: Digital World Glitches
description: Addon for The Digimod that adds Digital Glitches that can be fixed by using the Digivice
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want!


Introduction

This is an addon for The Digimod - If you don't have that mod installed, this one won't work at all!

 

This addon adds ''glitch'' blocks that will spawn randomly around the overworld. When you right-click any of these glitch blocks with a Digivice of any kind, they will get ''fixed'' and reveal a chest containing different loot.

You can obtain items that are originally only available through the creative menu of The Digimod this way, as they can appear in the chests!

 

All you need to do is simply put this mod in the mods folder and that's it. No extra steps requiered. The installing process is the exact same as any other regular mod. The only extra requierement is that you need The Digimod installed aswell. 

 

Loot you can find in the glitches

gbattack 3 *(1-1)*

boss_cube 3 *(1-1)*

machine_data 11 *(1-10)*
earth_data 11 *(1-10)*

bytedefense 11 *(1-2)*
bytespattack 11 *(1-2)*
bytespdefense 11 *(1-2)*
bytehealth 11 *(1-2)*

Yellow Glitch

The Yellow Glitch chest is a combination of both the Red Glitch and Blue Glitch. The Yellow Glitch can simply have all those items combined.

 

 

If you have any issues, questions, suggestions or want to share your experience playing this project, you can join our Discord server!
